title: Opera House in Nice | Mas du Chanoine
description: Opera House in Nice: French Riviera event near our guesthouse.
paragraphs: Located in Old Nice, the Opera House has a seafront facade. Rebuilt at the end of the 19th century, this classified building is typical of the theaters of that time, and its plans were looked after by Charles Garnier, architect of the Paris Opera. Throughout the year, symphonic and chamber music concerts, ballet performances and conferences are given.
